'''hadhasha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:coachway|coachway]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-dh-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:coachway|coachway]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| hadhasha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:hædhæshæth|hædhæshæth]] || [[word:hædhæshæj|hædhæshæj]] || [[word:hædhæshæsh|hædhæshæsh]] || [[word:hædhæshæ|hædhæshæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:hadhadhashath|hadhadhashath]] || [[word:hadhadhashaj|hadhadhashaj]] || [[word:hadhadhashash|hadhadhashash]] || [[word:hadhadhasha|hadhadhasha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:hadhashath|hadhashath]] || [[word:hadhashaj|hadhashaj]] || [[word:hadhashash|hadhashash]] || [[word:hadhasha|hadhasha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:hadhafshath|hadhafshath]] || [[word:hadhafshaj|hadhafshaj]] || [[word:hadhafshash|hadhafshash]] || [[word:hadhafshaf|hadhafshaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:hadhashatha|hadhashatha]] || [[word:hadhashaja|hadhashaja]] || [[word:hadhashasha|hadhashasha]] || [[word:hadhashaka|hadhashaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:hadhashath|hadhashath]] || [[word:hadhashaj|hadhashaj]] || [[word:hadhashash|hadhashash]] || [[word:hadhasha|hadhasha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:hadhashathal|hadhashathal]] || [[word:hadhashajal|hadhashajal]] || [[word:hadhashashal|hadhashashal]] || [[word:hadhashakal|hadhashakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:hadhashathatha|hadhashathatha]] || [[word:hadhashajaja|hadhashajaja]] || [[word:hadhashashasha|hadhashashasha]] || [[word:hadhashaka|hadhashaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:hadhashathan|hadhashathan]] || [[word:hadhashajan|hadhashajan]] || [[word:hadhashashan|hadhashashan]] || [[word:hadhashakan|hadhashakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:hadhashathaoro|hadhashathaoro]] || [[word:hadhashajaoro|hadhashajaoro]] || [[word:hadhashashaoro|hadhashashaoro]] || [[word:hadhashakaoro|hadhashakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|59e8839}}
